subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever been One in His Essence and One in His attributes, from time immemorial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو قد کان واحدا فی ذاته و واحدا فی صفاته لم یزل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
